class.name: AudioStreamMicrophone
class.brief_description: Stores audio data from an input device for immediate playback.
class.description: When [AudioStreamMicrophone] is used directly in an [AudioStreamPlayer] node, the audio stream player can play audio from an input device (a microphone for example) in real-time. This can be used in conjunction with [AudioEffectRecord] or [AudioEffectCapture] to save the data or process it. [b]Note:[/b] [member ProjectSettings.audio/driver/enable_input] must be [code]true[/code] for audio input to work. See also that setting's description for caveats related to permissions and operating system privacy settings. [b]Note:[/b] An audio stream player can only receive input from an [AudioStreamMicrophone] if its [code]playing[/code] property in an audio stream player (such as [member AudioStreamPlayer.playing]) is [code]true[/code].
